name: 密閉囚禁空間
description: Ashley被綁架囚禁在密閉空間，製造極端壓迫感和逃脫懸念，與外部Cora冒充的雙線剪輯形成強烈對比。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: If you stay here quietly for a month, I'll let you go. Don't bother trying to run away. / Tristan, where are you? Come and save me, please.
examples.context: Ashley被綁架囚禁在密閉空間，製造極端壓迫感和逃脫懸念，與外部Cora冒充的雙線剪輯形成強烈對比。
